message:
Add assignment filtering to ntm status command (bd-18r3m)

Implement filtering for --status, --agent, --pane, and --summary flags:
- filterAssignments helper filters by status, agent type, and pane number
- --summary flag shows only statistics without individual assignments
- Filtering works in both JSON and text output modes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
